memory:memory/2026-04-20.md:1:36.snippet: # memory/2026-04-20.md ## Session: First contact - Sahiix set up the bot (me, x ✦) - Named me "x" — short and punchy, they like that style - User: Sahiix, timezone Asia/Dubai (GMT+4) - BOOTSTRAP.md deleted — officially bootstrapped - Sahiix wants me active — proactive, not just waiting ## Files shared (inbound media) ### AI Prompt Docs Sahiix sent me 5 files about AI system prompt engineering: 1. **Prompt Evolution Timeline & Hybrid Framework** — GPT-4 → GPT-5.2 → Gemini 3 evolution; dual-channel (analysis/commentary), oververbosity scaling, adversarial detection 2. **Elite-Bot** — minimal, high-speed, technical, tool-chaining focus 3. **Master System Prompt (v1 + updated)** — XML/artifa
